exercises.title: Scheme Comparison
exercises.description: Compare emerging signature schemes from NIST Additional Call.
hints: Consider signature size, key size, and security basis

exercises.title: Round 4 KEM Analysis
hints: Classic McEliece trades size for confidence

exercises.title: Diversity Assessment
exercises.description: Assess the importance of algorithmic diversity in PQC.
hints: Consider the SIKE lesson about single points of failure

exercises.title: Future Monitoring
exercises.description: Create a process for monitoring emerging PQC schemes.
hints: Include academic conferences, NIST, and IETF
